_publications._publicationTitle: FT895 Impairs Mitochondrial Function in Malignant Peripheral Nerve Sheath Tumor Cells.

_contextSnippet: Further investigation of the mRNA expression of GLUT1 in MPNST cells showed increased expression in S462TY, T265, and ST8814
details: Increased GLUT1 mRNA and protein expression after FT895 treatment
